checks.feature: surface texture or helical thread pattern visible (check isometric view)
checks.notes: Vertical striations visible on the bottom cylindrical insert in both front view and isometric view, consistent with a threaded insert pattern

checks.feature: protruding prong/tab features visible (check isometric view)
checks.notes: Three prong/tab features are visible on top of the main body in the front view and isometric view, consistent with a 3-prong GoPro clip mount
The hourglass/bowtie shaped geometry visible in the top prong area suggests clip/snap geometry with a central pivot hole visible in front view
The 1/4-20 threaded insert is visible as a cylindrical protrusion on the bottom in the front and isometric views; the main rectangular body serves as the base flange

issues: Height verification is uncertain - the Z axis spans from approximately -12 to +21mm suggesting roughly 33mm total height rather than the specified 25mm
The bowtie/hourglass geometry in the prong area appears to be a rendering artifact or zero-thickness surface rather than solid geometry
Top view shows unusual diagonal line artifacts suggesting possible non-manifold or degenerate geometry in the main body
The 3-prong spacing and proportions are difficult to fully verify from these views
